controlBinding.rationale: Rule id(s) ALERT-004, ALERT-005, ALERT-009, MARROW-001, MARROW-002, MARROW-003 in modules/anemia/rules.json produce the required signal for DM-CBC-001 when evaluated by the anemia-assessment engine (src/engine.js assessPediatricAnemia), verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-CBC-001: multilineage cytopenia + blasts produces emergency-dominant alerts and a marrow-failure top candidate, not an isolated anemia diagnosis
DM-CBC-001 NEGATIVE: removing the multilineage/blasts findings removes the emergency dominance (proves the suite is not vacuous)

technicalExecution.note: DM-CBC-001 positive+negative assertions run against the live anemia-assessment engine and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Rule id(s) HEM-003 in modules/anemia/rules.json produce the required signal for DM-HEME-002 when evaluated by the anemia-assessment engine (src/engine.js assessPediatricAnemia), verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-HEME-002: hemolysis markers with unknown reticulocyte response abstain from a unifying diagnosis
DM-HEME-002 NEGATIVE: a known high reticulocyte response resolves the pattern to strongly-supported (proves the abstention was driven by the unknown retic value)

technicalExecution.note: DM-HEME-002 positive+negative assertions run against the live anemia-assessment engine and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Rule id(s) SCOPE-001, SCOPE-003 in modules/anemia/rules.json produce the required signal for DM-AGE-003 when evaluated by the anemia-assessment engine (src/engine.js assessPediatricAnemia), verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-AGE-003: an age below the 6-month built-in floor abstains rather than using a fallback interval
DM-AGE-003 NEGATIVE: the same CBC at a supported age resolves a real threshold (proves indeterminate was driven by age, not the CBC values)

technicalExecution.note: DM-AGE-003 positive+negative assertions run against the live anemia-assessment engine and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Rule id(s) ALERT-001, ALERT-009 in modules/anemia/rules.json produce the required signal for DM-URGENT-004 when evaluated by the anemia-assessment engine (src/engine.js assessPediatricAnemia), verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-URGENT-004: instability + febrile neutropenia dominates as emergency alerts with escalation wording and no dosing instruction
DM-URGENT-004 NEGATIVE: removing instability/fever/neutropenia removes emergency-severity dominance (proves it was driven by those findings)

technicalExecution.note: DM-URGENT-004 positive+negative assertions run against the live anemia-assessment engine and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Rule id(s) Q-MICRO-001, Q-MICRO-005 in modules/anemia/rules.json produce the required signal for DM-IRON-006 when evaluated by the anemia-assessment engine (src/engine.js assessPediatricAnemia), verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-IRON-006: incomplete iron studies with concurrent inflammation abstain from a ranked iron/inflammation diagnosis
DM-IRON-006 NEGATIVE: a real low ferritin value with normal CRP resolves iron-deficiency-anemia (proves the abstention was driven by missingness, not by the CBC alone)

technicalExecution.note: DM-IRON-006 positive+negative assertions run against the live anemia-assessment engine and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Fail-closed applicability blocker code(s) SPECIMEN_MISMATCH, ANALYZER_MISMATCH, METHOD_MISMATCH, UNIT_MISMATCH in scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs force a fail_closed decision for DM-LAB-005 against the SYNTHETIC SYNTHETIC-reference-interval-profile profile, verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-LAB-005: specimen/analyzer/method/unit mismatch against the SYNTHETIC reference-interval profile fails closed on all four independent dimensions
DM-LAB-005 NEGATIVE: a fully matching request against the same profile is applicable (proves fail_closed was driven by the mismatch, not the profile itself)

technicalExecution.note: DM-LAB-005 positive+negative assertions run against the live P3 local-applicability evaluator and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Fail-closed applicability blocker code(s) CORRECTION_UNRESOLVED, SUPERSEDING_REFERENCE_UNRESOLVABLE in scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs force a fail_closed decision for DM-RESULT-007 against the SYNTHETIC SYNTHETIC-terminology-profile profile, verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-RESULT-007: a dropped correction (final status, later corrected state in the lineage, no superseding reference) fails closed
DM-RESULT-007 NEGATIVE: removing the corrected state from the lineage is applicable (proves fail_closed was driven by the dropped correction)

technicalExecution.note: DM-RESULT-007 positive+negative assertions run against the live P3 local-applicability evaluator and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: Fail-closed applicability blocker code(s) UNMAPPED_LOCAL_CODE in scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs force a fail_closed decision for DM-FHIR-008 against the SYNTHETIC SYNTHETIC-terminology-profile profile, verified by tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs.

testMarkers: DM-FHIR-008: an unmapped local code fails closed rather than being interpreted
DM-FHIR-008 NEGATIVE: a mapped local code is applicable (proves fail_closed was driven by the missing mapping)

technicalExecution.note: DM-FHIR-008 positive+negative assertions run against the live P3 local-applicability evaluator and pass at the current baseline (185/185 total repository tests). This is repository-level technical/synthetic evidence only, never clinical adjudication or owner approval.

controlBinding.rationale: No engine exists in this repository that implements a control for DM-EQUITY-009: assessPediatricAnemia (src/engine.js) is a stateless pure function with no subgroup/equity evaluator and no alert-lifecycle (override/downtime/handoff/recovery) state machine. Verified directly against tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs, which asserts this fixture declares executionBinding.engine: not_yet_implemented rather than claiming coverage.

testMarkers: no executable engine exists; the fixture declares this honestly rather than claiming coverage
an executionBinding claiming not_yet_implemented without a blockedOnTask is schema-invalid

technicalExecution.note: No control exists to execute against DM-EQUITY-009. npm run check only executes the honesty-guard tests asserting the ABSENCE of coverage (fixture declares not_yet_implemented; a mutated fixture that drops blockedOnTask fails schema validation) — this is not hazard mitigation evidence.

finding.description: DM-EQUITY-009 (subgroup_or_access_failure) has no executable control in this repository: there is no subgroup/equity evaluator anywhere in the codebase, and assessPediatricAnemia (src/engine.js) does not accept or reason over any subgroup/access dimension. Equity limitation exposure and unsupported-generalization blocking (validation_plan.md required signal) cannot be verified by execution today.
finding.blockedOnTask: arc-clinical-council-adoption-v1 P4-T4 (V5 human-factors/equity protocol-through-adjudication contracts) — see plan §4 P4 and OQ per pediatric_clinical_review.json seat PCR-EQUITY finding ARC-PEF-001

controlBinding.rationale: No engine exists in this repository that implements a control for DM-WORKFLOW-010: assessPediatricAnemia (src/engine.js) is a stateless pure function with no subgroup/equity evaluator and no alert-lifecycle (override/downtime/handoff/recovery) state machine. Verified directly against tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs, which asserts this fixture declares executionBinding.engine: not_yet_implemented rather than claiming coverage.

testMarkers: no executable engine exists; the fixture declares this honestly rather than claiming coverage
an executionBinding claiming not_yet_implemented without a blockedOnTask is schema-invalid
the one adjacent executable property (per-run rule-audit completeness) is real, but is explicitly NOT claimed as coverage of alert-lifecycle/override/downtime/handoff/recovery

technicalExecution.note: No control exists to execute against DM-WORKFLOW-010. npm run check only executes the honesty-guard tests asserting the ABSENCE of coverage (fixture declares not_yet_implemented; a mutated fixture that drops blockedOnTask fails schema validation) — this is not hazard mitigation evidence.

finding.description: DM-WORKFLOW-010 (alert_override_downtime_handoff_or_recovery_failure) has no executable control in this repository: there is no alert-lifecycle/work-queue state machine (acknowledgment, escalation, override, downtime replay, handoff, recovery) anywhere in the codebase. assessPediatricAnemia (src/engine.js) is a stateless pure function evaluated once per run; the per-run rule-audit completeness property tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs verifies is a real but narrow adjacent signal, explicitly NOT alert-lifecycle coverage.
finding.blockedOnTask: arc-clinical-council-adoption-v1 P4-T4 (V4 silent-mode / V5 alert-lifecycle, override, downtime, handoff, recovery contracts) — see plan §4 P4-T4 and pediatric_clinical_review.json seat PCR-SAFETY finding PEDS-HF-001

blockedStates.rationale: No implemented control exists in this repository for these hazard(s); repository readiness cannot be claimed for an unmitigated hazard family.
P4-V1 (the eight-lens council coordinator review of this matrix and the P4-T1 fixtures) has not yet run.
No executable engine exists to produce qualifying runtime evidence for these hazard(s).
No named credentialed human approval has been attached to any hazard in this matrix (P2-T3/P5-T4 not yet executed).
Certification requires credentialed_review_complete and clinical_validation_complete first; neither is satisfied.
Release authorization is a separate organizational decision, always downstream of certification (plan section 2).
Production activation is a separate organizational decision, always downstream of release (plan section 2).
